title:
AN ACT CREATING BARRIO KAPATAGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DIGOS, PROVINCE OF
DAVAO DEL SUR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1374 / 67 OG No. 37, 7239 (September 13, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6210, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CREATING BARRIO KAPATAGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DIGOS, PROVINCE OF

DAVAO DEL SUR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Kapatagan in the Municipality of Digos, Province of Davao del Sur, is hereby converted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality to be known as the barrio of Kapatagan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
